species.citation: (Elmer) H.Eichler , Biblioth. Bot. 31 (1958) 51; ≡ Naravelia antonii Elmer , LPB 8 (1915) 2800 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 142; Wang, Acta Phytotax. Sinica 44 (2006) 696; Type: Elmer 13734 (PNH, holo, lost; A, BM, BO, FI, K, L, P, U, iso), Mindanao, Agusan del Norte, Cabadbaran, Mt Urdaneta, Sep-1912. = Naravelia philippinensis Merr. , PJS 11c (1916) 7; Type: Ramos BS 23459 (PNH, holo, lost; BM, BO, BRI, K, L, P, SING, US, iso), Luzon: Sorsogon, Mt Begacua, 21-Aug-1915.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. ?CATANDUANES, LUZON: Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan, Agusan del Norte.

species.citation: (Korth.) Kuntze , Verh. Bot. Vereins Prov. Brandenburg 26 (1885) 123 ; Eichler, Biblioth. Bot. 124 (1958) 58; ≡ Naravelia dasyoneura Korth. , Ned. Kruidk. Arch. 1 (1848) 208; Type: from Sumatra. = Naravelia lobata (Llanos) Merr. , Sp. Blancoanae (1918) 144 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 143; ≡ Atragene lobata Llanos , Fragm. Pl. Filip. (1851) 73 ; Fern.-Vill. & Naves in Blanco, Fl. Filip. ed. 3, 41 (1880) 57; Type: Merrill Species Blancoanae 656 (US, neo), Luzon: Bulacan, Calumpit, 14-Jan-1915. = Naravelia loheri Merr. & Rolfe , PJS 3c (1908) 98 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 202; Type: Loher 6 (US), Luzon: Rizal, Novaliches.
species.distribution: Borneo, Cambodia, Java, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Bulacan, NCR, Nueva Ecija, Pampanga, Pangasinan, Rizal, Tarlac.

D.Falck & Lehtonen , Phytotaxa 163 (2014) 58; ≡ Naravelia pauciflora H.Eichler , Biblioth. Bot. 31 (1958) 57; Type: Loher 6775 (K, holo), Luzon: Rizal, Montalban. = Naravelia laurifolia Wall. ex Hook.f. & Thomson , Fl. Ind. (Hooker f. & Thomson) 1 (1855) 3 ; Wall., Cat. (1831) No. 4685, nom. inval., nom. nud.; Fern.-Vill., Novis. App. (1880) 2; S.Vidal, Phan. Cuming. Philip. (1885) 91; Rev. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 35; Merr., Sp. (1837) 461, nom. illeg., non L. ; Fl. Filip. ed. 2 (1845) 321; Fl. Filip. ed. 3, 2 (1878) 231. ≠ Naravelia zeylanica auct. non (L.) DC. ; Fern.-Vill., Novis. App. (1880) 2; S.Vidal, Sinopsis Atlas (1883) 11.
species.distribution: India to Malay Peninsula, Philippines. BASILAN, GUIMARAS, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Benguet, Ilocos Norte, La Union, Rizal, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Norte, MINDORO.
species.notes: Lowland and medium elevation thickets and forests, rare or local.

species.citation: DC. , Syst. Nat. (Candolle) 1 (1817) 252 ; Eichler, Biblioth. Bot. 124 (1958) 24; Type: from Java. = Clematis gouriana Roxb. , Fl. Ind. (Roxburgh) 2 (1832) 670 ; Hort. Beng. (1814) 43, nom. inval., nom. nud.; Fern.-Vill., Novis. App. (1880) 1; S.Vidal, Sinopsis Atlas (1883) 11; Phan. Cuming. Philip. (1885) 91; Rev. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 35; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 141.

BATAN DE ALBAY, BOHOL, LUZON: Abra, Apayao, Benguet, Cagayan, Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, La Union, Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya, Pangasinan, Tarlac, MINDANAO: Agusan, Agusan del Norte, Cotabato, Davao, Davao Oriental (photos), Davao del Sur, Lanao, Lanao del Sur, South Cotabato, MINDORO.
species.notes: If considered as a variety of Clematis vitalba L., extending to Europe. Thickets and forests. 0-1500(-1600)m.

BANCALAN, BILIRAN, BOHOL, CATANDUANES, CEBU, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Aurora, Benguet, Ifugao, Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Davao, MINDORO, PALAWAN, PANAY, POLILLO. Notes: Usually in damp thickets of forests. 0-1600(-2400)m. Native.

species.citation: C.B.Rob. , Bull. Torrey Bot. Club 35 (1908) 65 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 143; Eichler, Biblioth. Bot. 124 (1958) 5; Type: Williams 1137 (K, NY), Luzon: Benguet, Baguio, 22-Jun-1904.
species.notes: Closely allied to Thalictrum urbanii Hayata (Thalictrum fauriei Hayata, auct. non Lév.) of Taiwan. On very steep slopes, cliffs, etc., in wet places, rare. 1500-2100m.
